mapper.update: UPDATE red_packet_record SET amount = #{amount}, nick_name = #{nickName}, img_url = #{imgUrl}, uid = #{uid}, red_packet_id = #{redPacketId}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO red_packet_record ( id, amount, nick_name, img_url, uid, red_packet_id, create_time, update_time) values ( #{id}, #{amount}, #{nickName}, #{imgUrl}, #{uid}, #{redPacketId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
